Header file for retrieving metadata information of the time settings module.

# Purpose
This header file provides a declaration for a function that retrieves metadata information related to time settings. The function `settings_time_get_info` returns a pointer to a `SettingsModuleMetadata` structure, which likely contains details about the time settings module. The inclusion of `settings_menu.h` suggests that this file is part of a broader settings management system. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. This code is intended to be included in other C++ source files that require access to time settings metadata.
